summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily Utilities Bull 3X ETF (UTSL) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Utilities Select Sector index. The fund provides daily 3x exposure to a market-cap-weighted index of utility companies in the US. UTSL was launched on May 3, 2017 and is issued by Direxion.

holdings.infoBox: UTSL is an equity ETF with a total of 45 individual holdings. The top holdings are Dreyfus Govt Cash Man Ins stock at 21.07%, NextEra Energy at 9.06%, Utilities Select Sector Index Swap at 6.56%, Goldman Sachs Fin Gov 465 Institut at 6.54%, and The Southern Company at 5.38%.

summary.post: . Holdings are typically published by the ETF issuer at the end of each trading day.
